mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, export_id, biz_date_from, biz_date_to, job_codes::text as job_codes_text, scope::text as scope_text, export_format, status, storage_path, file_size_bytes, sha256, row_counts::text as row_counts_text, error_message, requested_by, requested_at, completed_at, retention_until, trace_id
mapper.insert:
insert into batch.forensic_export_log ( tenant_id, export_id, biz_date_from, biz_date_to, job_codes, scope, export_format, status, storage_path, file_size_bytes, sha256, row_counts, error_message, requested_by, requested_at, completed_at, retention_until, trace_id ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{exportId}, #{bizDateFrom}, #{bizDateTo},
cast(#{jobCodesJson} as jsonb) null , cast(#{scopeJson} as jsonb), #{exportFormat}, #{status}, #{storagePath}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{sha256},
cast(#{rowCountsJson} as jsonb) null , #{errorMessage}, #{requestedBy},
#{requestedAt} current_timestamp , #{completedAt}, #{retentionUntil}, #{traceId} )
